Application.description: Returns all of the metadata of an application registered with AWS Systems Manager for SAP.

Arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the application.

AppRegistryArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the Application Registry.

DiscoveryStatus.description: The latest discovery result for the application.

LastUpdated.description: The time at which the application was last updated.

AssociatedApplicationArns.description: The Amazon Resource Names of the associated AWS Systems Manager for SAP applications.

Database.description: The SAP HANA database of an application registered with AWS Systems Manager for SAP.

DatabaseId.description: The ID of the SAP HANA database.

Arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the database.

LastUpdated.description: The time at which the database was last updated.

ConnectedComponentArns.description: The Amazon Resource Names of the connected AWS Systems Manager for SAP components.

Applications.description: The applications registered with AWS Systems Manager for SAP.

NextToken.description: The token to use to retrieve the next page of results. This value is null when there are no more results to return.

Arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the application.

Components.description: List of components registered with AWS System Manager for SAP.

NextToken.description: The token to use to retrieve the next page of results. This value is null when there are no more results to return.

Arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the component summary.

ConfigurationChecks.description: The configuration check types supported by AWS Systems Manager for SAP.

NextToken.description: The token to use to retrieve the next page of results. This value is null when there are no more results to return.

Id.description: The unique identifier of the configuration check.

Description.description: A description of what the configuration check validates.

ApplicableApplicationTypes.description: The list of SSMSAP application types that this configuration check can be evaluated against.

Databases.description: The SAP HANA databases of an application.

NextToken.description: The token to use to retrieve the next page of results. This value is null when there are no more results to return.

Arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the database.

Policy.description: The policy that removes permissions on the target database.

Component.description: The component of an application registered with AWS Systems Manager for SAP.

Sid.description: The SAP System Identifier of the application component.

SystemNumber.description: The SAP system number of the application component.

ParentComponent.description: The parent component of a highly available environment. For example, in a highly available SAP on AWS workload, the parent component consists of the entire setup, including the child components.

ChildComponents.description: The child components of a highly available environment. For example, in a highly available SAP on AWS workload, the child component consists of the primary and secondar instances.

Status.description:
The status of the component.

  • ACTIVATED - this status has been deprecated.

  • STARTING - the component is in the process of being started.

  • STOPPED - the component is not running.

  • STOPPING - the component is in the process of being stopped.

  • RUNNING - the component is running.

  • RUNNING_WITH_ERROR - one or more child component(s) of the parent component is not running. Call GetComponent to review the status of each child component.

  • UNDEFINED - AWS Systems Manager for SAP cannot provide the component status based on the discovered information. Verify your SAP application.

HdbVersion.description: The SAP HANA version of the component.

Resilience.description: Details of the SAP HANA system replication for the component.

EnqueueReplication.description: Indicates if or not enqueue replication is enabled for the ASCS component.

Ec2InstanceId.description: The ID of the Amazon EC2 instance.

IpAddresses.description: The IP addresses of the associated host.

Databases.description: The SAP HANA databases of the component.

DatabaseConnection.description: The connection specifications for the database of the component.

DatabaseArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name of the connected SAP HANA database.

LastUpdated.description: The time at which the component was last updated.

Arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the component.

ConfigurationCheckOperation.description: Returns the details of a configuration check operation.

Id.description: The unique identifier of the configuration check operation.

ApplicationId.description: The ID of the application against which the configuration check was performed.

Status.description: The current status of the configuration check operation.

StatusMessage.description: A message providing additional details about the status of the configuration check operation.

ConfigurationCheckId.description: The unique identifier of the configuration check that was performed.

ConfigurationCheckName.description: The name of the configuration check that was performed.

ConfigurationCheckDescription.description: A description of the configuration check that was performed.

StartTime.description: The time at which the configuration check operation started.

EndTime.description: The time at which the configuration check operation completed.

RuleStatusCounts.description: A summary of all the rule results, showing counts for each status type.

Warning.description: The number of rules that returned warnings.

Info.description: The number of rules that returned informational results.

Unknown.description: The number of rules with unknown status.

ResourceArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the operation.

LastUpdatedTime.description: The time at which the operation was last updated.

ConfigurationCheckOperations.description: The configuration check operations performed by AWS Systems Manager for SAP.

NextToken.description: The token to use to retrieve the next page of results. This value is null when there are no more results to return.

Id.description: The unique identifier of the configuration check operation.

ApplicationId.description: The ID of the application against which the configuration check was performed.

Status.description: The current status of the configuration check operation.

StatusMessage.description: A message providing additional details about the status of the configuration check operation.

ConfigurationCheckId.description: The unique identifier of the configuration check that was performed.

ConfigurationCheckName.description: The name of the configuration check that was performed.

ConfigurationCheckDescription.description: A description of the configuration check that was performed.

StartTime.description: The time at which the configuration check operation started.

EndTime.description: The time at which the configuration check operation completed.

RuleStatusCounts.description: A summary of all the rule results, showing counts for each status type.

Warning.description: The number of rules that returned warnings.

Info.description: The number of rules that returned informational results.

Unknown.description: The number of rules with unknown status.

OperationEvents.description: A returned list of operation events that meet the filter criteria.

NextToken.description: The token to use to retrieve the next page of results. This value is null when there are no more results to return.

Description.description: A description of the operation event. For example, "Stop the EC2 instance i-abcdefgh987654321".

Resource.description:
The resource involved in the operations event.

Contains ResourceArn ARN and ResourceType.

ResourceArn.description:
The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the source resource.

Example of ResourceArn: "arn:aws:ec2:us-east-1:111111111111:instance/i-abcdefgh987654321"

Status.description: The status of the operation event. The possible statuses are: IN_PROGRESS, COMPLETED, and FAILED.

StatusMessage.description: The status message relating to a specific operation event.

Timestamp.description: The timestamp of the specified operation event.

Operations.description: List of operations performed by AWS Systems Manager for SAP.

NextToken.description: The token to use to retrieve the next page of results. This value is null when there are no more results to return.

ResourceArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the operation.

LastUpdatedTime.description: The time at which the operation was last updated.

SubCheckResults.description: The sub-check results of a configuration check operation.

NextToken.description: The token to use to retrieve the next page of results. This value is null when there are no more results to return.

Id.description: The unique identifier of the sub-check result.

Description.description: A description of what the sub-check validates.

References.description: A list of references or documentation links related to the sub-check.

RuleResults.description: The rule results of a sub-check belonging to a configuration check operation.

NextToken.description: The token to use to retrieve the next page of results. This value is null when there are no more results to return.

Id.description: The unique identifier of the rule result.

Description.description: A description of what the rule validates.

Message.description: A message providing details about the rule result.

Metadata.description: Additional metadata associated with the rule result.
